issue_title: [BUG] - Many to Many relation fields not displaying data in edit mode.
issue_body_preview:
### Description

When navigating for the first time to edit mode for a record that has a column with a relation implicit many-to-many, the multi-select for these fields is displayed empty, and when I try to open them to select, it throws the following error:
```
 POST /api/admin/options 500 in 110ms
test_description_zh: 导航到一条具有多对多关系字段的记录的编辑页面，观察多对多关系的多选下拉框是否正确显示已关联的数据，并尝试打开下拉框选择新选项。
expected_result_zh: 进入编辑模式后，多对多关系字段的多选下拉框应正确回显当前已关联的数据项，打开下拉框时应正常加载可选选项列表，不出现500错误或空白状态。
